name: Andhra Pradesh
tagline: Trusted Packers & Movers across Andhra Pradesh
hero: Premium relocation services in all 26 districts of Andhra Pradesh
description: PackersHub is Andhra Pradesh's most trusted packers and movers company. Headquartered in Nellore, we serve all 20 major AP cities with professional packing, safe transport, and on-time delivery. From Visakhapatnam's IT corridor to Tirupati's spiritual hub — our trained crews handle every move with care. GST-compliant billing, 100% transit insurance, and 4.9★ average rating from 2,847+ verified customers.

name: Telangana
hero: Safe & affordable shifting across all Telangana cities
description: Leading packers and movers in Telangana. Specializing in Hyderabad's tech-district relocations and intercity moves across all 33 Telangana districts. Our GPS-tracked fleet ensures your household, office or vehicle reaches safely. Hyderabad to anywhere — we move it right.

name: Tamil Nadu
hero: End-to-end packing & moving across Tamil Nadu
description: Professional packers and movers serving all major Tamil Nadu cities. From Chennai's bustling metro to Coimbatore's industrial zone and Madurai's heritage district — PackersHub handles every move with precision. GST invoicing, comprehensive insurance, and 24×7 customer support.

name: Karnataka
hero: Trusted movers in Bangalore, Mysore & all Karnataka cities
description: Premium packers and movers in Karnataka. Bangalore's most-reviewed moving company with expertise in IT-campus relocations, corporate shifting, and intercity household moves. Serving all 30 Karnataka districts with trained crews, modern trucks, and full transit insurance.

name: Kerala
hero: God's own country deserves the best movers
description: Kerala's most trusted packers and movers. Serving all 14 districts including Thiruvananthapuram, Kochi, Kozhikode, Thrissur and beyond. Specialized handling for Kerala's unique geography — hill stations, coastal areas, and narrow lanes. Fully insured, GPS-tracked, and 24×7 available.
